rationale: The citing paper mentions Danaher et al. (2015) only as an example of prior work showing how online/mobile promotions affect offline consumer responses (e.g., coupon redemption). It appears in grouped background citations used to position the paper's gap (offline competitive context to online eWOM), rather than as a specific basis for hypotheses or design. The citing study does not reuse Danaher et al.'s model, data, measures, or core mechanism in its empirical analysis.
